title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0115 110-112 The Assembly, East Street, Bedminster, Bristol, BS3 4EY
body: "Type of application:  Application for Planning Permission and for relevant demolition of an unlisted building in a conservation area  Applicant name:  TMT Capital Ltd  Site address:  110-112 The Assembly, East Street, Bedminster, Bristol, BS3 4EY  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of the rear extensions and construction of a large HMO (Sui Generis). Change of use of remaining ground floor unit from public house to a commercial unit (Use Class E).  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 12 August 2025   Date by when representations must be made 15 September 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 17 October 2025   Decision date 17 October 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 146 KB, 10 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 15 September 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0115 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     30-07-25 PINS Covering Let  (PDF, 480 KB, 6 pages)  Application Form  (PDF, 5.47 MB, 14 pages)  BNG Exemption Statement  (PDF, 241 KB, 3 pages)  CIl Form  (PDF, 1.44 MB, 6 pages)  Coal Mining Report  (PDF, 1.3 MB, 10 pages)  Daylight and Sunlight Impact Assessment - Rev01  (PDF, 3.09 MB, 20 pages)  Energy and Sustainability Statement - R1  (PDF, 19 MB, 32 pages)  FRA Drainage and ST  (PDF, 7.28 MB, 25 pages)  HDAS  (PDF, 9.34 MB, 16 pages)  Internal Daylight Assessment - Rev01  (PDF, 3.75 MB, 15 pages)  Marketing Report - 110-112 East...
